en/warmer: {"risk_level":"medium","perception":"Sounds like you want something but won't say what 🤷","subtext":"They're either being cagey about their real ask or don't value my time enough to state their need upfront","risk_reason":"Ambiguous ask forces recipient to guess intent","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"Hey! Would love to catch up — you around this week?","rationale":"Shows genuine interest, implies social not transactional","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"Hey, do you have 15 minutes today to talk about [specific thing]?","rationale":"States the actual ask with time boundary","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"hey just checking in, you free?","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — no clear light register to build on","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"Hey, are you free for a quick call when you have a moment?","rationale":"Removes checking-in language that can read as surveillance, adds flexibility","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":["ambiguous ask","unstated assumptions"]}
en/clearer: {"risk_level":"medium","perception":"Lands as a blunt command — no context, no courtesy buffer 📋","subtext":"Do this because I said so, not because we're collaborating.","risk_reason":"Opens with demand, zero framing or please","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"Would you be able to send me the report by Friday?","rationale":"Softens the ask into a request rather than an order","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"I need the Q4 report by Friday EOD so I can prep for Monday's meeting.","rationale":"Names the report and explains the deadline's purpose","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"send me the report by friday","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — professional request about a deadline","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"Could you please send the report by end of day Friday?","rationale":"Adds courtesy marker and specifies timing to prevent misread as harsh","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":["ambiguous ask","abrupt tone"]}
en/funnier: {"risk_level":"high","perception":"Lands as a demand with zero context 🚨","subtext":"You expect me to drop everything for your mystery task without even saying please.","risk_reason":"Opens with demand, no context, no courtesy","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"Would you be able to wrap that up today?","rationale":"Question form softens the ask and acknowledges recipient's agency","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"Can you finish the report by end of day today?","rationale":"Names the task and sets clear deadline","risk_after":"medium"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"I need that done today","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"Could you prioritize finishing that today if possible?","rationale":"Removes command tone, adds courtesy escape hatch","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":["ambiguous ask","unstated assumptions"]}
en/safer: {"risk_level":"medium","perception":"Lands as impatient or annoyed 😐","subtext":"You're irritated I haven't updated you yet, or you don't trust me to follow through.","risk_reason":"Abrupt demand with no context or greeting","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"Hey! Just checking in — how's it going on your end?","rationale":"Greeting plus softer check-in removes the demand energy","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"Can you send me a quick update on [project/task name]?","rationale":"Names what you're asking about and frames it as a request","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"what's the status","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — message is too terse to land a joke","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"Do you have a quick update you can share?","rationale":"Polite question format removes all edge and urgency","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":["ambiguous ask","unstated assumptions"]}
es/warmer: {"risk_level":"low","perception":"Casual, friendly greeting — warm and light 👋","subtext":"I'm checking in, no agenda, just saying hi","risk_reason":"Clean opener — no hidden asks or tension","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"hola amigo! cómo estás — te estaba pensando","rationale":"Adds genuine personal interest without making it heavier","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"hola amigo, como estas?","rationale":"Already maximally clear — simple greeting needs no adjustment","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"hola maestro, cómo va la vida?","rationale":"Elevates playfulness with 'maestro' and broader check-in","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"safer","text":"hola amigo, como estas?","rationale":"Already safe — no ambiguity or misread potential","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":[]}
ja/warmer: {"risk_level":"low","perception":"Casual friendly check-in, standard greeting 👋","subtext":"Just saying hi, no pressure or agenda","risk_reason":"Standard greeting with no hidden asks","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"こんにちは元気ですか","rationale":"Already at maximum warmth for this greeting format","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"こんにちは、最近どうですか","rationale":"Adds punctuation and specifies timeframe (lately/recently) for clearer intent","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"こんにちは元気ですか","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — simple greeting","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"safer","text":"こんにちは元気ですか","rationale":"Already safe — no misread risk in standard greeting","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":[]}
ar/warmer: {"risk_level":"low","perception":"Friendly casual check-in 👋","subtext":"Standard greeting — recipient will read as polite and warm","risk_reason":"Clean opener — no hidden asks or tension","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"مرحبا! كيف حالك؟ ان شاء الله بخير","rationale":"Adds warmth with exclamation and well-wishing","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"مرحبا، كيف الأحوال معك؟","rationale":"Slightly more specific about asking how things are going","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"مرحبا كيف حالك","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — simple greeting","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"مرحبا كيف حالك","rationale":"Already maximally safe — no changes needed","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":[]}
fr/warmer: {"risk_level":"low","perception":"Casual greeting, lands as friendly and relaxed 👋","subtext":"Just checking in, no hidden agenda","risk_reason":"Standard greeting — no misread likely","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"bonjour ! j'espère que tu vas bien 😊","rationale":"Adds warmth with punctuation energy and well-wishing","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"salut, comment tu vas aujourd'hui ?","rationale":"More direct with 'aujourd'hui' specifying timeframe","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"bonjour comment ça va","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — basic greeting works as-is","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"bonjour, comment allez-vous ?","rationale":"Formal 'vous' removes any risk of unwanted familiarity","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":[]}
pt/warmer: {"risk_level":"low","perception":"Casual, friendly check-in — reads as informal and warm 👋","subtext":"Just saying hi, keeping it light, no agenda.","risk_reason":"No ask or tension — pure greeting","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"Olá! Tudo bem com você?","rationale":"Adding 'com você' makes it feel more personal and attentive","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"Oi! Como você está?","rationale":"Direct question form removes ambiguity about whether response is expected","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"olá tudo bem","rationale":"Context doesn't call for humor — greeting is already appropriately casual","risk_after":null},{"axis":"safer","text":"olá tudo bem","rationale":"Already maximally safe — no subtext to remove","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":[]}
de/warmer: {"risk_level":"low","perception":"Casual German greeting, friendly but informal 👋","subtext":"This is a standard hello-how-are-you opener with no hidden agenda","risk_reason":"Safe informal greeting — no detectable tension","suggestions":[{"axis":"warmer","text":"Hallo! Wie geht es dir heute?","rationale":"Adding 'heute' shows genuine interest in this specific moment","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"clearer","text":"Hallo! Wie geht's?","rationale":"Contraction makes it sound more natural and conversational","risk_after":"low"},{"axis":"funnier","text":"Hallöchen! Alles fit im Schritt?","rationale":"Playful rhyming phrase — only use with people who appreciate casual humor","risk_after":"medium"},{"axis":"safer","text":"Hallo! Wie geht es dir?","rationale":"Proper capitalization and punctuation keep it clean and respectful","risk_after":"low"}],"flags":[]}
